#Summary1=(human1) In his letter to O. A. Brownson, D.D., LL.D., Samuel A. Mudd, M.D. contrasts the people of the North with the people of the South, describing the people of the North as hypocritical, selfish, and lacking Patriotism, in order to critique Brownson and to remind him that slavery is an important State institution and that Christ has made no command against its practice.
#Text=The people of the South are differently constituted from those of the North — attributable to education and climate .
#Text=As an example they are more sensitive — their sense of honor is much more keen and they would sooner run the risk of death , than live with an injured reputation .

#Text=It is seldom you hear of a duel in the North , where parties are challenged to mortal combat to settle their grievances , but you find instead a recourse to law — a few dollars satisfying the dishonored .
#Text=I say this in no disparagement , but merely to show the dissimilarity of the two people .
#Text=The South also possess in a high degree — the virtues of forbearance , endurance and magnanimity .
#Text=The war as it has progressed goes to prove and you will find these characteristics still more noticeable as it advances .

#Text=The people of the North are Puritanical , long faced or Methodistic and hypocritical — they deal in Sympathetic language to hide their deception — their actions are Pharisaical , covert , stealthy , and cowardly .
#Text=They are law abiding so long as it bears them out in their selfish interest , and praisers and scatterers and follo,wers of the Bible so long as it does not conflict with their passions .
#Text=They make good cow drivers , pickpockets and gamblers .
#Text=With these traits of character in your leading politicians and preachers — it is impossible that confidence can be inspired in the South .
#Text=Their words and actions for reasons alleged above are all met with mistrust by their Southern brethren .

#Text=Your people have so degenerated , that were it not for the foreign element — which you possess — there would be only war on parchment , as it is , there is just enough of true Yankee to make the rest good for nothing , but an expense to the Nation .

#Text=They fight very hard when there is no danger of being hurt and for the want of some visible exemplification of the destruction of shell and shot , they turn their pieces upon each other , resulting in the death of many , which fortunately is more gain than loss to the Federal Government .

#Text=The union would be better maintained and restored , if the battles could always take place among each of this vast Army of 700,000 and end in its own total destruction , because the cause being removed — the patient the Government , would be soon convalescent — unless the system is so much depressed , there is not left sufficient vital power to bring about a healthy reaction .
#Text=I regret sincerely to see such a lack of Patriotism in the Present Administration and in the representatives of the North .
#Text=They seem to be dreamy and mystified — they rush headlong regardless of law and its consequences and skulk like sheep - stealing dogs , when another nation stands up in open contravention .

#Text=I confidently assert , that if there was any other man at the head of the Government of true conservative and constitutional principles , the Revolution would immediately cease so far as the South is concerned .

#Text=It 's my opinion that you and Bishop Hughes have put yourselves upon the same footing as the rest of the demagogues and Preachers of your Section such as Beecher , Cheeves , Smith , Phillips and Etc.
#Text=You have destroyed all the good you have accomplished and the church instead of prospering will lose ground in your midst so soon as the government settles down once more into a peace .
#Text=They will see clearly , the folly of those would be leaders political and religious , and it 's not the least improbable that many will have to seek an asylum in a foreign land .
#Text=You will please excuse this hasty and roughly scribbled epistle — it is not my intention to rob you of that jewel — honesty of intention .
#Text=You know full well , that slavery being a State institution recognized by every administration and confirmed by many acts of Congress , can only be abrogated by State will .
#Text=The South has stood a high protective tariff for many years , without a murmur , ( excepting S. Carolina ) and for what ?
#Text=Namely to support a few manufacturing interests in the North .

#Text=The North has grown rich by the products of slave labor , pride and self esteem was its consequence ; he considers himself the most exalted of God 's creation , and deigns to establish principles of humanity for the rest of mankind .
#Text=Christ , our Saviour found slavery at his coming and yet he made no command against its practice .
#Text=Therefore I think it is a great presumption in man to supply the omissions which God in his infinity thought proper to make .

#Text=My remarks are more directed to the Non-Catholic portion of the North but I fear from your leaning and that of Bishop Hughes , you will bring about an unkind feeling between members of our church — especially against their Superiors , North and South .

#Text=I would like , had I the time to give you some practical illustrations of the two systems of labor in a medical , religious and temporal point of view , as it is manifest to me , but I must now conclude by wishing you prosperity in all your undertakings when directed for the honor and glory of God .
#Text=Most respectfully , Samuel A. Mudd , M.D.
#Text=O. A. BROWNSON D.D. LL.D.
